angle.description: The angle (in degrees) along which the tick labels are rendered. By default, uses the start angle of the rotation axis.

axisId.description: Id of the radius axis to render. If not provided, it will use the first defined radius axis.

center.description: If true, the tick labels are centered on the axis line instead of being offset away from it.

className.description: A CSS class name applied to the root element.

disableLine.description: If true, the axis line is not rendered.

disableTicks.description: If true, the ticks are not rendered.

tickSize.description: The size (in pixels) of the tick marks.

root.description: Styles applied to the root element.

tickContainer.nodeName: the group including the tick and its label
